General.Name: Jiande International Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Jiande International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the development and sale of real estate properties in the People's Republic of China. It develops residential and commercial properties. The company is based in Quarry Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Westlands Centre, Quarry Bay, Hong Kong
